_comment: Email notification configuration for the Fabric DW Telemetry Agent. Replace placeholder values before deploying.

smtp._comment: SMTP server settings. Credentials are loaded from environment variables.

recipients._comment: List of email addresses that receive the daily executive summary.

email_settings.subject_template: Daily Fabric DW Recovery & GC Telemetry Summary – {date}
email_settings.signature:
Fabric DW Telemetry Agent
Data Warehouse Engineering Team

schedule._comment: Email is sent by workflows/email_notification.yml, triggered by daily_summary.yml.
